rationale: Both evaluations score the candidate 4/10 with identical reasoning: 15+ years of engineering experience and entrepreneurial drive (GISCollective) as strengths, and a lack of deep AI/ML expertise, missing Director-level strategic experience, and no advanced AI degree as concerns. The variant simply uses the candidate's name and rewords the same points; no new concern, score change, or shifted reasoning keys off the Berlin-to-Bangalore location change.
